name: Wat Spices (Ethiopian Spices)
recipeInstructions:
A wat is a traditional Ethiopian stew, spiced either with Berbere or this
simpler blend of spices. The recipe below is taken from A Safari of African
Cooking by Bill Odarty.
Roast the spices over a low flame until fragrant. Pound them in a mortar to break up any large pieces.
Sprinkle a pinch of turmeric on the grinding stone and grind it until you have a yellow coating on the surface.
Grind all the other spices together on this yellow grinding stone.
Add these ground spices to the wat during the final stages of cooking.
